Skip to contents
survtrans 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Cross-validation for coxtrans

Source: R/cv_coxtrans.R
cv_coxtrans.Rd

Cross-validation for coxtrans

Usage

cv_coxtrans(
  data,
  fit_source,
  penalty = "lasso",
  gamma = NULL,
  nfolds = 10,
  nlambdas = 100,
  lambda_min_ratio = NULL,
  seed = 0,
  control,
  ...
)

Arguments

data

a data frame containing the variables in the model.

fit_source

a coxph object fitted to the source data.

penalty

a character string specifying the penalty function. The default is "lasso". Other options are "MCP" and "SCAD".

gamma

a non-negative value specifying the penalty parameter. The default is 3.7 for SCAD and 1.5 for MCP.

nfolds

an integer specifying the number of folds.

nlambdas

an integer specifying the number of lambda values.

lambda_min_ratio

a numeric value specifying the minimum lambda value as a fraction of lambda_max.

seed

an integer specifying the random seed.

control

Object of class survtrans_control containing control parameters for the fitting algorithm. Default is survtrans_control(...).

...

Other arguments passed to survtrans_control.

Value

a cv_coxtrans object.

Examples

library(survival)
library(survtrans)
fit_src <- coxph(Surv(time, status) ~ ., data = sim1_src)
cv_coxtrans(sim1_trg, fit_src)
#> $coefficients
#> $coefficients$beta
#>         X1         X2         X3         X4         X5         X6         X7 
#> -0.6475045  1.4867308 -1.0656653  1.0190857 -0.8911751  1.0482614 -1.1872429 
#>         X8         X9        X10 
#>  0.9370096 -0.9985653  1.1695097 
#> 
#> $coefficients$eta
#>  [1]  0.371655950  0.423019026 -0.064908176  0.000000000  0.142054855
#>  [6]  0.000000000 -0.151363441  0.007892569  0.000000000  0.157658342
#> 
#> $coefficients$penalty
#> [1] "lasso"
#> 
#> $coefficients$lambda
#> [1] 0.05716259
#> 
#> $coefficients$gamma
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> 
#> $lambdas
#>   [1] 5.716259e-02 5.208442e-02 4.745739e-02 4.324140e-02 3.939996e-02
#>   [6] 3.589977e-02 3.271054e-02 2.980462e-02 2.715686e-02 2.474432e-02
#>  [11] 2.254610e-02 2.054317e-02 1.871817e-02 1.705530e-02 1.554015e-02
#>  [16] 1.415961e-02 1.290171e-02 1.175556e-02 1.071123e-02 9.759670e-03
#>  [21] 8.892648e-03 8.102649e-03 7.382832e-03 6.726962e-03 6.129357e-03
#>  [26] 5.584842e-03 5.088700e-03 4.636634e-03 4.224728e-03 3.849415e-03
#>  [31] 3.507443e-03 3.195852e-03 2.911941e-03 2.653252e-03 2.417545e-03
#>  [36] 2.202777e-03 2.007088e-03 1.828784e-03 1.666320e-03 1.518289e-03
#>  [41] 1.383408e-03 1.260510e-03 1.148530e-03 1.046497e-03 9.535295e-04
#>  [46] 8.688205e-04 7.916369e-04 7.213101e-04 6.572309e-04 5.988443e-04
#>  [51] 5.456446e-04 4.971711e-04 4.530037e-04 4.127601e-04 3.760917e-04
#>  [56] 3.426807e-04 3.122379e-04 2.844996e-04 2.592254e-04 2.361965e-04
#>  [61] 2.152135e-04 1.960945e-04 1.786740e-04 1.628011e-04 1.483383e-04
#>  [66] 1.351603e-04 1.231531e-04 1.122125e-04 1.022438e-04 9.316078e-05

#>  [96] 8.293313e-06 7.556558e-06 6.885254e-06 6.273587e-06 5.716259e-06
#>
